highlighted.whyItMatters: A built-in plugin renders a configurable empty state when the grid has no rows. Replace any custom DOM overlays you were using for empty datasets.

highlighted.tagline: Dialog plugin gains a template option
highlighted.whyItMatters: The Dialog plugin now accepts a template option so you can drive its content from a string or function instead of imperatively writing into its container.
The Filters plugin gains an Enter key handler and a new searchMode option that controls how the by-value list reacts to user input. Useful if you customized filter behavior with hooks.
rowHeights now has a minRowHeights alias for API consistency with minSpareRows and similar minimum-style options. Both keys keep working - choose whichever reads better in your code.

highlighted.tagline: Focus scopes mechanism for nested grids
highlighted.whyItMatters: Focus management is now organized around named scopes, which fixes focus jumping between nested grids, dialogs, and editors. Custom plugins that called focus APIs directly may need light adjustments.
